recommendations.title: Meet the Malawas
recommendations.overview: A news anchor, a comedian, an actress, and a soccer player with big egos have to travel across the globe to meet the Malawa tribe for a TV show.

recommendations.title: Lucky Luke
recommendations.overview: Fearless gunslinger, Lucky Luke, is ordered by the President to bring peace to Daisy Town.

recommendations.title: Happiness Never Comes Alone

recommendations.title: Hellphone
recommendations.overview: A teenager feels an endless fascination for his cellular which will enable him to reach his aim: alluring the pretty high-school girl he's in love with. Unfortunately, this special "addiction" will not be without negative consequences on the behavior

recommendations.title: Brice 3
recommendations.overview: Brice is back. The world has changed, but not him. When his best friend, Marius, calls for help, he goes on a wild adventure that will lead him to the other side of the world... Travel shapes youth but will he remain the king of the "casse" ?

recommendations.title: The New Toy
recommendations.overview: Samy lives happily with his wife, Alice, in a poor urban housing project amongst friends and neighbours. For his son’s birthday, the richest man in France throws open his grand department store, offering the boy whatever he wants. Alexandre chooses S

recommendations.title: Surfer, Dude
recommendations.overview: A wave twisting tale of a soul searching surfer experiencing an existential crisis.

recommendations.title: Luca
recommendations.overview: Luca and his best friend Alberto experience an unforgettable summer on the Italian Riviera. But all the fun is threatened by a deeply-held secret: they are sea monsters from another world just below the water’s surface.

recommendations.title: Ready to Mingle
recommendations.overview: A wannabe bride seeks professional help to find a husband and in the process finds herself.

recommendations.title: Magic in the Moonlight
recommendations.overview: Set in the 1920s French Riviera, a master magician is commissioned to try and expose a psychic as a fraud.
